name: Ondo Finance
description: Real-world asset platform issuing tokenised US Treasury products including OUSG and USDY. SEC-compliant for US qualified purchasers.
complianceObligations: KYC/AML required for OUSG (restricted to accredited investors). USDY available to non-US investors only. Complies with US securities regulations; transfer restrictions enforced onchain.

name: Maple Finance
description: Institutional onchain credit protocol enabling lending to real-world borrowers and providing yield via Syrup vaults.
complianceObligations: KYC/AML required for all lenders and borrowers. Permissioned pools only. Borrowers undergo institutional credit assessment. Complies with applicable securities and lending regulations.

name: Centrifuge
description: Decentralised finance protocol bringing real-world assets onchain via tranched issuer SPVs and ERC-1400 security tokens.
complianceObligations: KYC/AML required for access to permissioned pools. Asset originators must sign real-world legal agreements. Pools structured through SPVs with offchain legal enforceability.

name: Mountain Protocol
description: Bermuda-regulated issuer of USDM, a permissionless yield-bearing stablecoin backed by short-term US Treasuries.
complianceObligations: Mountain Protocol is regulated by the Bermuda Monetary Authority and restricts participation to non-US investors.

name: Tangible
description: Real-world asset platform tokenising real estate and physical assets via Swiss SPVs (rebranded to re.al).
complianceObligations: KYC is required for real-estate purchases, and Tangible operates within the Swiss and EU regulatory framework.

name: Pendle
description: Yield-trading protocol that splits tokenised assets into principal and yield tokens, including RWA wrappers.
complianceObligations: Pendle is a permissionless DeFi protocol; however, the underlying wrapped RWA assets carry their own KYC requirements.

name: Plume Network
description: EVM-compatible Layer 1 designed for real-world asset tokenisation with native compliance primitives.
complianceObligations: Base network access does not require KYC/KYB, but asset issuers and trading systems on Plume can require KYC, KYB, and accredited investor checks via integrated compliance partners.

name: MANTRA
description: Cosmos SDK-based Layer 1 designed for compliant institutional asset tokenisation under VARA and ADGM frameworks.
complianceObligations: MANTRA is VARA-licensed in the UAE and FSRA-compliant for the Abu Dhabi Global Market.

name: Sky
description: Decentralised stablecoin protocol issuing DAI and USDS, formerly known as MakerDAO. Operates RWA collateral vaults via regulated custodians.
custodyModel: Mixed: self-custody vaults and SPV for RWA collateral
complianceObligations: Sky is permissionless DeFi at the user layer; RWA collateral vaults are managed via Monetalis and BlockTower under regulated US trustees.

name: BlackRock
description: World's largest asset manager. Issues BUIDL, a tokenised USD money-market fund, distributed via Securitize.
complianceObligations: BUIDL is offered under SEC Rule 144A and Section 3(c)(7), restricted to qualified purchasers, with KYC handled by Securitize.

name: Franklin Templeton
description: Asset manager operating a tokenised US government money-market fund (BENJI / FOBXX) with on-chain shareholder records.
complianceObligations: Access is provided through dedicated investor channels, with ownership records maintained through the applicable transfer-agent framework and a blockchain-integrated recordkeeping system.

name: Backed Finance
description: Tokenisation platform issuing blockchain-based tracker certificates representing ETFs and equities under the Swiss DLT Act.
complianceObligations: KYC required for account opening and for issuance or redemption access. Availability is limited to eligible professional or qualified investors, and products are not offered to U.S. persons or restricted jurisdictions.

name: Securitize
description: RWA tokenisation platform handling issuance, compliance and trading for institutional issuers including BlackRock, Apollo, KKR and Hamilton Lane.
complianceObligations: SEC-registered transfer agent and broker-dealer. Full KYC/AML onboarding required for all investors. Complies with US securities law for digital asset issuance and secondary trading.

name: Goldfinch
description: Decentralised credit protocol financing FinTech lenders in emerging markets via diversified senior secured pools.
complianceObligations: KYC/AML identity verification required to supply capital or participate in governance. U.S.-based individuals must verify accredited investor status through third-party providers including Persona and Parallel Markets.

name: Superstate
description: SEC-registered investment adviser issuing tokenised short-duration US government securities (USTB) and corporate credit (USCC).
complianceObligations: Access is limited to eligible investors in supported jurisdictions with onboarding required before participation. Wallet addresses used for token delivery or trading must be added to an onchain allowlist.

name: OpenEden
description: Regulated digital-asset platform providing tokenised US Treasury bills via the TBILL vault for non-US accredited investors.
complianceObligations: KYC and KYT onboarding, together with signed subscription documents, are required for access. Approved wallet addresses are whitelisted for onchain transactions.

name: Matrixdock
description: Digital-asset platform issuing tokenised short-term US Treasuries (STBT) and gold (XAUM) products from Singapore.
complianceObligations: Access to permissioned products requires KYC verification. Some products are limited to accredited investors with whitelisted wallet addresses, and access conditions vary by product and venue.

name: Paxos
description: NYDFS-regulated trust company issuing PAX Gold (PAXG) and the USDP stablecoin.
complianceObligations: Paxos operates under an NYDFS Trust Charter; KYC is required for large redemptions.

name: TrueFi
description: Uncollateralised institutional lending protocol issuing structured credit notes for KYC'd borrowers.
complianceObligations: Lending is permissionless for all participants; institutional borrowers are subject to KYC and credit checks.

name: Hashnote
description: CFTC-registered investment management firm issuing USYC, a tokenised short-duration US Treasury vehicle. Acquired by Circle in January 2025; operates under Bermuda licensing.
complianceObligations: KYC/AML onboarding is required, and approved wallet addresses are added to an allowlist after review. Availability is limited to eligible non-U.S. institutional participants.

name: Clearpool
description: Decentralised capital markets ecosystem for institutional borrowers with single-borrower lending pools.
complianceObligations: Lending is permissionless; all borrowers are KYC-verified and reviewed by a credit committee.

name: Ethena
description: Synthetic-dollar protocol issuing USDe and USDtb. USDtb is collateralised by tokenised US Treasuries via BUIDL.
complianceObligations: USDe is permissionless; USDtb access is governed by the compliance terms of the underlying RWA collateral.

name: RealT
description: Real estate tokenisation platform offering fractional ownership of US rental properties via per-property LLC SPVs.
complianceObligations: Wallet addresses must be whitelisted for each property before purchase or secondary trading. Users are required to satisfy applicable U.S. legal requirements.

name: Lofty
description: Tokenised real estate marketplace offering fractional property ownership on Algorand via per-property LLC SPVs.
complianceObligations: KYC is required before users can purchase tokens, and identity verification is conducted through a third-party provider.

name: Spiko
description: French tokenisation platform issuing UCITS-compliant money-market fund shares for EU retail and institutional investors.
complianceObligations: Spiko funds are Banque de France-regulated UCITS and are SFDR-compliant; KYC is required for all investors.

name: Tether
description: Issuer of USDT and the gold-backed XAUT token. Reserves held with regulated custodians.
complianceObligations: KYC is required for direct issuance and redemption; secondary market trading requires no KYC.

name: Dinari
description: First SEC-registered broker-dealer authorised to issue tokenised US public equities and ETFs (dShares).
complianceObligations: Dinari is an SEC-registered broker-dealer; full KYC is required for all users, and the platform is open to both US and non-US investors.

name: Huma Finance
description: PayFi network providing instant liquidity for cross-border payments and trade finance receivables.
complianceObligations: KYC is required for institutional lenders; borrower pools are permissioned.

name: Figure
description: Licensed US lender originating home equity lines of credit and securitising them on Provenance Blockchain.
complianceObligations: Figure is a licensed US lender; full KYC and AML checks are required for all borrowers and investors.

name: Archax
description: London-based digital asset exchange, brokerage and custodian, FCA-regulated, used by Aberdeen for AMMF.
complianceObligations: Archax is FCA-regulated; full KYC is required for all accounts, and the platform has an institutional focus.

name: Provenance Blockchain
description: Public, open-source blockchain for financial services enabling the full digitally-native asset lifecycle across lending, securitisation, payments and exchanges. Originally developed by Figure Technologies.
complianceObligations: Provenance Blockchain supports compliant asset issuance through on-chain registry infrastructure; individual issuer compliance obligations vary by asset.

name: Polymesh
description: Permissioned blockchain built for regulated assets, designed to address governance, identity, compliance, confidentiality and settlement requirements for security tokens.
complianceObligations: Customer Due Diligence is built into the network. Every identity and asset-related onchain transaction requires a valid CDD claim issued by permissioned KYC providers, and issuers can enforce compliance rules onchain in real time.
